  {
   "cell_type": "markdown",
   "id": "722c8d95",
   "metadata": {},
   "source": [
    "<h1 align=\"center\">Exploring Nutrition with Data Science</h1>\n",
    "\n",
    "---\n",
    "\n",
    "## 📌 Links\n",
    "- **Original Datasets** → DATASET_LINKS = [\n",
    "    (\"daily_food_nutrition_dataset\", \"https://storage.googleapis.com/kagglesdsdata/datasets/6606266/10666963/daily_food_nutrition_dataset.csv?X-Goog-Algorithm=GOOG4-RSA-SHA256&X-Goog-Credential=gcp-kaggle-com%40kaggle-161607.iam.gserviceaccount.com%2F20250924%2Fauto%2Fstorage%2Fgoog4_request&X-Goog-Date=20250924T132441Z&X-Goog-Expires=259200&X-Goog-SignedHeaders=host&X-Goog-\"),\n",
    "    (\"nutrients csvfile.csv\", \"https://storage.googleapis.com/kagglesdsdata/datasets/797832/1368751/nutrients_csvfile.csv?X-Goog-Algorithm=GOOG4-RSA-SHA256&X-Goog-Credential=gcp-kaggle-com%40kaggle-161607.iam.gserviceaccount.com%2F20250924%2Fauto%2Fstorage%2Fgoog4_request&X-Goog-Date=20250924T132529Z&X-Goog-Expires=259200&X-Goog-SignedHeaders=host&X-Goog-\"),\n",
    "    (\"Indian_Food\", \"https://storage.googleapis.com/kagglesdsdata/datasets/6818823/10960650/Indian_Food_Nutrition_Processed.csv?X-Goog-Algorithm=GOOG4-RSA-SHA256&X-Goog-Credential=gcp-kaggle-com%40kaggle-161607.iam.gserviceaccount.com%2F20250924%2Fauto%2Fstorage%2Fgoog4_request&X-Goog-Date=20250924T192355Z&X-Goog-Expires=259200&X-Goog-SignedHeaders=host&X-Goog-\"),\n",
    "    (\"foodstruct_nutritional_facts\", \"https://storage.googleapis.com/kagglesdsdata/datasets/5628069/9488478/foodstruct_nutritional_facts.csv?X-Goog-Algorithm=GOOG4-RSA-SHA256&X-Goog-Credential=gcp-kaggle-com%40kaggle-161607.iam.gserviceaccount.com%2F20250924%2Fauto%2Fstorage%2Fgoog4_request&X-Goog-Date=20250924T192243Z&X-Goog-Expires=259200&X-Goog-SignedHeaders=host&X-Goog-\")\n",
    "]\n",
    "\n",
    "- **Presentation Slides** → PRESENTATION_URL = \"https://docs.google.com/presentation/d/1jVFkUTaTKaJCQAjpNNRqWDLJNinIc7f7IqCiMvRuZU4/edit?slide=id.p#slide=id.p\"\n",
    "\n",
    "- **Streamlit App**  → APP_URL = \"https://YOUR_STREAMLIT_DEPLOYMENT_URL_HERE\"  \n",
    "\n",
    "\n",
    "---\n",
    "\n",
    "<p align=\"center\">\n",
    "  <img src=\"Presentation/eat-icegif-6.gif\" alt=\"Demo GIF\" width=\"80%\">\n",
    "</p>\n",
    "\n",
    "\n",
    "<h1 align=\"center\">🥗 Diet & Nutrition Dashboard</h1>\n",
    "\n",
    "<p align=\"center\">\n",
    "  <a href=\"https://www.python.org/\"><img alt=\"Python\" src=\"https://img.shields.io/badge/Python-3.10+-3776AB?logo=python&logoColor=white\"></a>\n",
    "  <a href=\"https://streamlit.io/\"><img alt=\"Streamlit\" src=\"https://img.shields.io/badge/Streamlit-🎈-FF4B4B?logo=streamlit&logoColor=white\"></a>\n",
    "  <a href=\"https://altair-viz.github.io/\"><img alt=\"Altair\" src=\"https://img.shields.io/badge/Altair-Visualization-1E90FF\"></a>\n",
    "  <img alt=\"License\" src=\"https://img.shields.io/badge/License-{LICENSE_NAME}-brightgreen\">\n",
    "</p>\n",
    "\n",
    "\n",
    "---\n",
    "\n",
    "## 📖 Overview\n",
    "The **Diet & Nutrition Dashboard** is an interactive Streamlit app that makes eating well **simple, visual, and actionable**.\n",
    "You can explore foods, compare categories, build a meal plan, and get smart suggestions for healthier swaps.\n",
    "\n",
    "<p align=\"center\">\n",
    "  <i>Explore → Understand → Plan → Improve</i>\n",
    "</p>\n",
    "\n",
    "---\n",
    "\n",
    "## 🧭 Table of Contents\n",
    "- [Features](#-Features)\n",
    "- [Pages](#-pages)\n",
    "- [Screenshots](#-Screenshots)\n",
    "- [Quickstart](#-quickstart)\n",
    "\n",
    "---\n",
    "\n",
    "## ✨ Features\n",
    "- Discover **high-protein** & **fibre-rich** foods\n",
    "- Compare **macro balance** across categories\n",
    "- Build a **personal meal plan** (by meal & grams)\n",
    "- Get **healthier swaps** to improve the plan\n",
    "- Clean visuals (Altair) and fast UX (Streamlit)\n",
    "\n",
    "---\n",
    "\n",
    "## 📄 Pages\n",
    "**Page 1 — Food Explorer**  \n",
    "• Filters by calories, protein, fibre, categories  \n",
    "• **Top Protein** (per 100 g / per 100 kcal) & **Top Fibre**  \n",
    "• **High Sugar / High Fat** lists to limit  \n",
    "\n",
    "**Page 2 — Category Insights & Balance**  \n",
    "• Average nutrients per category (Protein, Carbs, Fat, Fibre, Sugar)  \n",
    "• **Macro balance** (Protein–Carbs–Fat %)  \n",
    "• **Category health score (median)** + **Best picks within each category**  \n",
    "\n",
    "**Page 3 — Meal Tracker**  \n",
    "• Build your plan by meal and grams  \n",
    "• Totals + progress to daily kcal target  \n",
    "• Download CSV, edit/move/remove items  \n",
    "\n",
    "**Page 4 — Suggestions**  \n",
    "• Plan health summary (protein density, fibre, sugar, fat, kcal)  \n",
    "• Smart **healthier swaps** (same category by default)  \n",
    "• One-click **Apply Swap** to update your plan  \n",
    "\n",
    "---\n",
    "\n",
    "## 📸 Screenshots\n",
    "\n",
    "| Page 1 — Food Explorer | Page 2 — Category Insights & Balance |\n",
    "|-------------------------|---------------------------------------|\n",
    "| ![Page 1](Presentation/s1.png) | ![Page 2](Presentation/s2.png) |\n",
    "\n",
    "| Page 3 — Meal Tracker | Page 4 — Suggestions |\n",
    "|------------------------|-----------------------|\n",
    "| ![Page 3](Presentation/s3.png) | ![Page 4](Presentation/s4.png) |\n",
    "\n",
    "---\n",
    "\n",
    "## ⚡ Quickstart\n",
    "\n",
    "```bash\n",
    "# 1) Clone\n",
    "git clone https://github.com/YOUR_USERNAME/{REPO_NAME}.git\n",
    "cd {REPO_NAME}\n",
    "\n",
    "# 2) Create venv (optional) and install deps\n",
    "python -m venv .venv && source .venv/bin/activate  # on Windows: .venv\\\\Scripts\\\\activate\n",
    "pip install -r requirements.txt\n",
    "\n",
    "# 3) Run the app\n",
    "streamlit run app.py\n"
   ]
  }
 ],
 "metadata": {
  "language_info": {
   "name": "python"
  }
 },
 "nbformat": 4,
 "nbformat_minor": 5
}
